đź’ˇINTEL
=======
đź“ŚActive since 2021
đź“ŚCIS Nexus Exclusion
đź“ŚCoded in C and Go
đź“ŚAbout infected 100+ Victims
đź“ŚLeaks available from August 2023
đź“ŚFrom the Group Member Profile, Twitter joined in 2011, but became active in late 2023 by listing compromised victims
đź“ŚOnly few leaks (about 8) are available for free download. Rest of the victim's data are not listed and is up for direct sale
đź“ŚUses unpatched vulnerabilities to exploit victim's network
đź“ŚStarted to revamp their DLS site in February 2024
đź“ŚLow activity detected for couple of last months, which happened in 2024 and 2025
đź“ŚFound presence of Amadey Stealer đź”‘ in adjacent IP addresses, which could have been used by BlackByte Group
đź“ŚI have exposed 4 IPs in 2024 and 1 IP in 2025 (July)
đź“ŚAfter September 2024, the group made a comeback in July 2025 (keeping quiet for 10 months) listing 5 Victims
